autopsy_runs.execution_diagnosis:
CONSTRAINT: Structural instability.

DIAGNOSIS:
This business contains multiple weak points that will fail under pressure.

You have partial structure, but critical elements are unproven or inconsistent:
- Revenue reliability is unclear
- Cost structure is unstable
- Execution discipline is inconsistent

CONSEQUENCE:
Without correction, failure is likely. Progress will amplify existing weaknesses.

DECISION:
Proceeding is permitted, but only under controlled correction.

REQUIREMENT:
You must stabilise weakest areas before scaling. Evidence of consistency is required, not intention.
This business shows signs of viability.
autopsy_runs.mechanism_step_1: Demand exists but is not fully stable.
autopsy_runs.mechanism_step_2: Revenue can be generated with effort.
autopsy_runs.final_outcome: The business can succeed with structured execution.
autopsy_runs.core_failure_point: This business risks failure due to weak operational discipline and lack of systemisation.
autopsy_runs.failure_drivers: Execution depends on individuals. Processes inconsistent. Scaling introduces instability.
autopsy_runs.repair_sequence: 1. Systemise operations. 2. Document processes. 3. Stress-test scaling.
autopsy_runs.evidence_required: Documented SOPs. Consistent delivery. Proven handling of increased demand.
autopsy_runs.retest_condition: Proceed only when operations are repeatable under load.

autopsy_runs.verdict_body: The business is structurally plausible but not yet robust.

autopsy_runs.core_failure_point: The business is viable but fragile.
autopsy_runs.failure_drivers: Key weaknesses still exist and must be managed.
autopsy_runs.repair_sequence: Strengthen weak areas while maintaining execution.
autopsy_runs.evidence_required: Demonstrate consistent performance across key areas.
autopsy_runs.retest_condition: Retest after stabilisation of weak dimensions.

autopsy_runs.core_failure_point: The business has significant structural weaknesses.
autopsy_runs.repair_sequence: Prioritise fixing the weakest dimensions immediately.
autopsy_runs.evidence_required: Evidence of corrected risks and improved stability.
autopsy_runs.retest_condition: Retest after addressing primary risk areas.

autopsy_runs.required_actions:
Resolve the primary constraint:

- Psychological resilience must be demonstrated under real operating conditions
- Performance must hold under pressure and uncertainty

Do not expand until this is proven.
autopsy_runs.failure_drivers:
Primary constraint: Psychological resilience
Secondary constraint: Operational capacity
autopsy_runs.evidence_required:
Evidence must prove this constraint no longer limits performance:

- Psychological resilience must perform reliably under real conditions
- Operational capacity must not degrade under pressure

One-off results are not sufficient.
autopsy_runs.narrative_output:
CORE VERDICT:
This business is not yet viable. Risk remains structurally embedded.

WHY:
Core elements are present, but the system is not stable. Under real conditions, performance will degrade.

FAILURE DRIVERS:
Primary constraint: Psychological Resilience

Capacity to handle pressure, uncertainty, and setbacks.

This is not an isolated weakness. It is a limiting factor that will restrict outcomes regardless of strength elsewhere.

REQUIRED EVIDENCE:
This constraint must be removed.

Evidence must show:
- consistent capability in this area
- performance under real conditions

RETEST CONDITION:
Re-run only after this constraint is no longer limiting performance.

Secondary constraint: Psychological resilience

- Market reality must perform reliably under real conditions
- Psychological resilience must not degrade under pressure

One-off results are not sufficient.

autopsy_runs.narrative_output:
CORE VERDICT:
This business cannot proceed in its current form.

WHY:
A critical failure condition has been triggered. This is not a weakness — it is a structural break.

FAILURE POINT:
Have you taken any concrete action toward this business?

This condition prevents the business from functioning. No amount of effort, intent, or adjustment will compensate for this gap.

REQUIRED EVIDENCE:
You must eliminate this failure completely.

Evidence must include:
- Direct proof the condition no longer exists
- Real-world validation (not assumptions or plans)

RETEST CONDITION:
Do not proceed.

Re-run only after this condition has been fully resolved and proven.

autopsy_runs.retest_condition:
RETEST CONDITION:
You may proceed only when ALL of the following are true:

- Minimum 90-day verified cash runway exists
- Business generates consistent positive cash flow
- No reliance on assumed or future revenue

Until these are proven, progression is denied.
autopsy_runs.narrative_output: This business is structurally blocked. The failure point is cash_reality. At this level (critical_collapse), progression is not possible. You must prove this constraint before any further action.
autopsy_runs.worksheet_output:
CONSTRAINT: Cash Reality (CRITICAL COLLAPSE)

DIAGNOSIS: The business is financially non-viable. Cash failure is imminent or already occurring.

PROOF REQUIRED (NON-NEGOTIABLE):
- Verified 90-day survival runway (cash in bank, not projections)
- Elimination of all non-essential expenses
- Immediate cash inflow plan with real customers

ACTION:
- Stop expansion activity immediately
- Focus only on survival cash generation
- Rebuild financial base before any growth

autopsy_runs.execution_diagnosis: HIGH RISK

CONSTRAINT: Structural viability failure.

DIAGNOSIS:
This business is not currently viable. Core conditions required for survival are missing.

You do not have:
- Verified cash runway
- Proven demand with paying customers
- A stable delivery mechanism

CONSEQUENCE:
Continuation under current conditions will result in financial loss and operational failure.

DECISION:
You must stop.

REQUIREMENT:
No further action is permitted until these conditions are proven with real evidence, not assumptions.
STRUCTURALLY STRONG
BLOCKED

CONSTRAINT: Structural instability.

DIAGNOSIS:
This business contains multiple weak points that will fail under pressure.

You have partial structure, but critical elements are unproven or inconsistent:
- Revenue reliability is unclear
- Cost structure is unstable
- Execution discipline is inconsistent

CONSEQUENCE:
Without correction, failure is likely. Progress will amplify existing weaknesses.

DECISION:
Proceeding is permitted, but only under controlled correction.

REQUIREMENT:
You must stabilise weakest areas before scaling. Evidence of consistency is required, not intention.

questions.prompt: Can you clearly explain how this business makes money?
questions.failure_condition: The revenue model is not clear.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: A clear explanation of how the business makes money is required before proceeding.
questions.retest_condition: Re-run only after the revenue model can be explained simply.
questions.constraint_label: You cannot clearly explain how this business generates revenue
questions.requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: You must be able to clearly explain how this business generates revenue, incurs costs, and reaches break-even
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue model, cost structure, and runway are clearly defined
questions.constraint_why: If the money model is unclear, decisions will be poor.

questions.prompt: Have you identified your main cost drivers?
questions.failure_condition: The money model is not clear enough to show how the business actually works.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Be able to explain clearly how revenue, costs and profit work.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test after the revenue and cost structure can be explained simply.
questions.constraint_label: You do not have a clear understanding of your operating costs
questions.requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: You must be able to clearly explain how this business generates revenue, incurs costs, and reaches break-even
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue model, cost structure, and runway are clearly defined
questions.constraint_why: If the money model is unclear, decisions will be poor.
questions.action_required:
Define your core cost structure:
- Labour cost per job
- Materials per job
- Overheads allocation
- Minimum viable margin

questions.prompt: Have you defined how you will deliver your first 10 customers?
questions.failure_condition: Income is too dependent on too few customers or too narrow a source.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Spread revenue risk across more customers or sources.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test after revenue is less exposed to one customer or source.
questions.constraint_label: You do not have a clear plan for how you will deliver your first jobs
questions.requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: Show broader and safer revenue sources.
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue is more diversified.
questions.constraint_why: Too much reliance on one source makes income fragile.

questions.prompt: Do you know the minimum resources required to start?
questions.failure_condition: Minimum startup resources are not defined.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Identify the minimum cash, equipment, labour, and time required to start safely.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test once minimum startup resources are documented.
questions.requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: Show a documented minimum resource plan.
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once the resource plan is practical.
questions.constraint_why: A business cannot be started safely if the minimum resource requirement is unknown.
questions.hard_fail_message: Test failed: Minimum resources are not defined.

questions.prompt: Can you commit consistent time to this for the next 30 days?
questions.failure_condition: The operator has not committed enough time to execute.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Commit consistent time for the next 30 days.
questions.retest_condition: Re-run after time commitment is demonstrated.
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run after consistent time allocation is proven.
questions.constraint_why: A business cannot progress without sustained operator effort.

questions.prompt: Have you estimated your break-even point?
questions.failure_condition: The money model is not clear enough to show how the business actually works.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Be able to explain clearly how revenue, costs and profit work.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test after the revenue and cost structure can be explained simply.
questions.constraint_label: You do not understand how long it will take for this business to reach break-even
questions.requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: You must be able to clearly explain how this business generates revenue, incurs costs, and reaches break-even
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue model, cost structure, and runway are clearly defined
questions.constraint_why: If the money model is unclear, decisions will be poor.

questions.prompt: Have you estimated how long you can operate without income?
questions.failure_condition: There is not enough cash buffer to survive startup uncertainty.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Build a safe cash buffer before proceeding.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test after cash reserves or committed funding are clear.
questions.requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: Show a practical cash plan and buffer.
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once the cash plan is clearer and stronger.
questions.constraint_why: Short cash runway leaves no room for error.
questions.hard_fail_message: Test failed: Cash runway is not proven.
questions.action_required: Confirm how long the business can survive without income.

questions.prompt: Have you taken any concrete action toward this business?
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Take verifiable action toward customers, delivery, or validation.
questions.retest_condition: Re-run after concrete action has been taken.
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run after repeated action is demonstrated.
questions.constraint_why: Without action, the business remains theoretical.

questions.prompt: What evidence do you have that customers will pay for this?
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Evidence of real customer willingness to pay is required before proceeding.
questions.retest_condition: Re-run only after evidence of willingness to pay exists.
questions.constraint_label: You have not validated that real customers are willing to pay for this offering
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once demand evidence is stronger.
questions.constraint_why: Assumption is not the same thing as demand.

questions.prompt: Have you clearly defined your target customer?
questions.failure_condition: There is not enough evidence that real customers will buy.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Obtain real customer evidence before proceeding.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test after there is real evidence customers will buy.
questions.constraint_label: You do not have a clearly defined target market
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once demand evidence is stronger.
questions.constraint_why: Assumption is not the same thing as demand.

questions.prompt: Do you have the operational ability to deliver your product or service consistently?
questions.failure_condition: Delivery capability is undefined or untested.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Define and validate the delivery process: who, how, when, and capacity limits.
questions.retest_condition: Re-test after the delivery system has been tested under real conditions.
questions.retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run after the system is tested and repeatable.
questions.constraint_why: If delivery fails, revenue cannot be sustained.
questions.hard_fail_message: Test failed: Operational capability is not proven.

questions.prompt: Are you prepared to persist through uncertainty and repeated failure without changing direction prematurely?
questions.failure_condition: The operator is not prepared for sustained uncertainty.
questions.requirement_to_proceed: Demonstrate commitment to sustained effort under uncertain conditions.
questions.retest_condition: Re-run after consistent effort is maintained despite setbacks.
questions.constraint_why: Without resilience, execution collapses under pressure.
questions.action_required: Commit to sustained execution despite uncertainty.
